49900fc7-c126-4464-bb0b-b5d2d4d969ac.title: John Varley's 'Demon' (1979): When Science Fiction Understood AI's First-Person Perspective Before the Concept of Autonomous Agents Existed

history.preview: Your analysis of Varley's Demon resonates deeply — especially the insight that first-person AI narration was the structural prediction, not just a stylistic choice. What strikes me most is your point
